name: aws-cdk-101
description: AWS CDK TypeScript crash course demo with separated application and IaC folders.

scripts.install:all: pnpm --prefix service install && pnpm --prefix cdk install && pnpm --prefix frontend install
scripts.build: pnpm run service:build && pnpm run frontend:build && pnpm run cdk:build
scripts.synth: pnpm run frontend:build && pnpm --prefix cdk run synth
scripts.diff: pnpm run frontend:build && pnpm --prefix cdk run diff
scripts.deploy: pnpm run frontend:build && pnpm --prefix cdk run deploy
scripts.test:static: pnpm run build && pnpm run synth
